# CTO Watchdog Report — 2026-06-19

## Summary
**9/15 checks passed, 4 warnings, 2 failures.** Critical issues: `@prisma/client-finance` not generated by startup hook (unblocked after manual generation); 119 `Number()` coercions on Decimal money fields; 50+ missing FK indexes; 2 web test failures in CreateContactModal.

---

## A. Code Health

| Check | Status | Details |
|-------|--------|---------|
| A1 TS Errors API | WARN | Initially 4 errors (all `@prisma/client-finance` not generated). Root cause: startup hook runs `prisma generate` but omits `--schema=prisma-finance/schema.prisma`. After manual `npx prisma generate --schema=prisma-finance/schema.prisma`: 0 errors. **Fix the startup hook.** |
| A1 TS Errors Web | PASS | 0 errors |
| A2 Security | WARN | 3 controllers need guard verification: `shop-shipping`, `shop-public-config`, `shop-line-chat`. LocalStorage E2E token path in `apps/web/src/lib/api.ts:10-14` (reads token from localStorage, clears it, but window exists). No SQL injection, no hardcoded secrets. |
| A3 Decimal | FAIL | **119 `Number()` coercions near money fields** in production service files. Top offenders: `team-dashboard.service.ts`, `customer-scoring.service.ts`, `collections-notifier.service.ts`, `contract-snapshot.service.ts`, `tax-export.service.ts`, `paysolutions-confirmation.service.ts`, `finance-tools.service.ts`. Loses sub-cent precision on large Decimal values. |
| A4 Soft-Delete | WARN | ~15–25% of `findMany`/`findFirst`/`findUnique` calls lack `deletedAt: null`. Many use post-fetch manual check (`if (!record \|\| record.deletedAt)`) — inconsistent and error-prone. Notable: `contract-exchange.service.ts:68`, `commission.service.ts:68`, `defect-exchange.service.ts:37`, `gfin-config.service.ts:60,85,131,154,202`. |
| A5 Tests API | WARN | 4882/5037 passing. 145 failures all caused by `DATABASE_URL` not set (integration tests requiring DB — expected in sandbox). 10 affected suites: `other-income.service.spec.ts`, `depreciation.service.spec.ts`, `asset-reports.service.spec.ts`, `maker-checker.spec.ts`, `doc-number.service.spec.ts`, `asset-journal.service.spec.ts`, `collections-foundation.seed.spec.ts`, `template.service.spec.ts`. Test count has grown from documented 577 → 5037 total. |
| A5 Tests Web | FAIL | **660/662 passing. 2 tests fail in `CreateContactModal.test.tsx`.** Test expects `apiPostMock` to be called after form submit (`hasVat` assertion), but mutation is not firing. Real test failure, not environment issue. |
| A6 Bundle | WARN | Build succeeded (17s). No chunks exceed 500KB gzipped. However 7 chunks exceed 500KB raw: `excel` (930KB/256KB gz), `thai-address-data` (871KB/69KB gz), `LettersPage` (569KB/220KB gz), `ContractTemplatesPage` (490KB/145KB gz), `pdf` (431KB/139KB gz), `charts` (418KB/120KB gz), `CollectionsPage` (386KB/101KB gz). Vite warns about these. `LettersPage` and `excel` are the biggest concerns for mobile users. |

## B. Database Health

| Check | Status | Details |
|-------|--------|---------|
| B1 Schema | WARN | IDs: 182/190 models use UUID ✓. Money: 202 Decimal fields, 0 Float fields ✓. Enums: all PascalCase/SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE ✓. **Timestamps: 70+ models missing audit fields** — Critical models include `Customer`, `CompanyInfo`, `Promotion`, `ExpenseDetail`, `PayrollDetail`, `PromiseSlot`, `ExpenseLine`, `PayrollLine`. Soft-delete and lifecycle tracking not possible on these. |
| B2 Migrations | PASS | 278 total migrations. Most recent 5 have descriptive names. `20260971_remove_2fa` drops 2FA columns/table — documented and intentional. `20260969` adds new enum (non-destructive). No unexpected DROP TABLE in recent history. |
| B3 Indexes | WARN | **50+ FK fields missing indexes on high-traffic models.** Top gaps: `Contract` (5 FKs unindexed: `productId`, `reviewedById`, `interestConfigId`, `pdpaConsentId`, `exchangedFromContractId`), `ContractExchangeRequest` (8 FKs unindexed), `OtherIncome` (7 FKs unindexed), `RepairTicket` (5 FKs unindexed), `ChatRoom` (6 FKs unindexed). Full-table scans risk on Contract queries. |
| B4 Drift | PASS | Latest migration (`20260972_journal_line_restrict_and_index`) matches schema exactly. `JournalLine` `onDelete: Restrict` and compound index `[journalEntryId, deletedAt]` verified in both migration SQL and schema.prisma. |

## C. Chatbot Health

| Check | Status | Details |
|-------|--------|---------|
| C1 AI Service | OK | Model: `claude-sonnet-4-6` ✓. `MAX_TOOL_ITERATIONS = 5` with 30s timeout per iteration ✓. Sentry: `captureMessage` on max-iterations + `captureException` on errors ✓. `maxTokens: 1024` ✓. |
| C2 Prompt | OK | 2,494 characters. Bank account (203-1-16520-5) ✓, phone (063-134-6356) ✓, hours (จันทร์-เสาร์ 09:00-18:00) ✓. No contradictions. Security rule "ห้ามเดาตัวเลข — ใช้ tool ดึงจาก DB" enforced by `get_current_balance` tool ✓. |
| C3 Tools | OK | 7/7 tools defined and handled: `get_current_balance`, `get_payment_schedule`, `calculate_fine`, `list_recent_receipts`, `get_bank_info`, `search_knowledge_base`, `handoff_to_human`. Default case catches undefined tools. PII redacted before logging ✓. |
| C4 Auto-Trigger | OK | All 6 reminder types implemented (T-5, T-3, T-1, T, T+1, T+3). Idempotency via `ChatAutoTrigger` unique constraint on `(customerId, referenceKey)`. Sentry capture on both reminder and escalation cron errors. Timezone: Asia/Bangkok ✓. |
| C5 Security | OK | LIFF controller uses `LiffTokenGuard` (correct — no JWT). Admin controller uses `JwtAuthGuard + RolesGuard` on all endpoints. Webhook dedup via `ProcessedWebhookEvent` (7-day retention). LINE webhook uses HMAC-SHA256 with `timingSafeEqual`. Customer data scoped to `customerId` from server-side context (not client input) ✓. |

---

## Action Items (Priority Order)

### P0 — Fix Today

1. **Startup hook missing finance Prisma client generation**
   `apps/api/package.json` build script already has `prisma generate --schema=prisma-finance/schema.prisma` but the startup hook (`scripts/setup.sh` or equivalent) only calls the default `prisma generate`. Add the finance schema generation to the startup hook to prevent TS errors and broken API test suites on every fresh container.

2. **2 web test failures — `CreateContactModal.test.tsx`**
   Tests at lines 113-118 fail: form submits but `apiPostMock` is not being called. Likely a form `onSubmit` handler regression or a missing `waitFor` scope. File: `apps/web/src/components/contacts/CreateContactModal.test.tsx`.

### P1 — This Sprint

3. **119 `Number()` coercions on money fields (A3)**
   Replace with `new Prisma.Decimal(value)` or `prisma.Decimal` arithmetic. Start with highest-risk: `paysolutions-confirmation.service.ts` (payment processing), `contract-snapshot.service.ts` (contract balance), `tax-export.service.ts` (VAT reporting).

4. **50+ missing FK indexes (B3)**
   Add `@@index` on all unindexed FK fields in `Contract`, `ContractExchangeRequest`, `OtherIncome`, `RepairTicket`, `ChatRoom`. A single migration can cover all of these. `Contract.productId` is highest priority — queried on every contract load.

5. **3 unverified public controllers (A2)**
   Audit `shop-shipping.controller.ts`, `shop-public-config.controller.ts`, `shop-line-chat.controller.ts` for guard coverage. Add explicit guards or add to the documented public-controller allow-list in `security.md`.

### P2 — Next Sprint

6. **70+ models missing timestamp fields (B1)**
   Add `createdAt`/`updatedAt`/`deletedAt` to `Customer`, `CompanyInfo`, `ExpenseDetail`, `PayrollDetail`, `Promotion`, `PromiseSlot`, `ExpenseLine`, `PayrollLine` as highest-priority. Use 2-step migration (add optional → backfill → optional stays) since these are production tables.

7. **Soft-delete query pattern inconsistency (A4)**
   Audit `findUnique` calls in `contract-exchange.service.ts`, `gfin-config.service.ts`, `defect-exchange.service.ts` to add `where: { deletedAt: null }` inline rather than relying on post-fetch checks. Consider a Prisma middleware to enforce `deletedAt: null` globally.

8. **Bundle size — `LettersPage` (220KB gz) and `excel` (256KB gz) (A6)**
   `LettersPage` at 569KB raw suggests inline dependencies that could be split. Consider lazy-loading the excel/PDF generation libraries only when the user triggers a download action.

9. **localStorage E2E token path (A2)**
   Replace the `localStorage.getItem('access_token')` pattern in `apps/web/src/lib/api.ts:10-14` used for E2E tests with Playwright's `page.route()` or auth state injection to avoid the XSS window.
